com.societegenerale.failover.core.expiry.ExpiryPolicy

Package
Description
com.societegenerale.failover.configuration
Spring Boot auto-configuration for the failover framework.
com.societegenerale.failover.core.expiry
Expiry policy and extractor abstractions for controlling cached payload lifetime.

  • Uses of ExpiryPolicy in com.societegenerale.failover.configuration

    Methods in com.societegenerale.failover.configuration that return ExpiryPolicy
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ExpiryPolicy<Object>
    FailoverAutoConfiguration.defaultExpiryPolicy(FailoverClock clock, FailoverExpiryExtractor failoverExpiryExtractor)
    Creates the default expiry policy bean.
    ExpiryPolicy<Object>
    FailoverAutoConfiguration.failoverExpiryPolicy(ExpiryPolicy<Object> defaultExpiryPolicy, ExpiryPolicyLookup<Object> expiryPolicyLookup)
    Creates the composite failover expiry policy.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ExpiryPolicy<Object>
    FailoverAutoConfiguration.failoverExpiryPolicy(ExpiryPolicy<Object> defaultExpiryPolicy, ExpiryPolicyLookup<Object> expiryPolicyLookup)
    Creates the composite failover expiry policy.
    FailoverHandler<Object>
    FailoverAutoConfiguration.failoverHandler(KeyGenerator keyGenerator, ExpiryPolicy<Object> expiryPolicy, FailoverClock clock, FailoverStore<Object> failoverStore, PayloadEnricher<Object> payloadEnricher, RecoveredPayloadHandler recoveredPayloadHandler, CompositeObservablePublisher observablePublisher, FailoverExpiryExtractor failoverExpiryExtractor, PayloadSplitterLookup<Object,Object> payloadSplitterLookup, ContextPropagator contextPropagator, org.springframework.beans.factory.ObjectProvider<org.springframework.core.task.TaskExecutor> scatterGatherExecutorProvider, FailoverProperties failoverProperties)
    Assembles the full FailoverHandler decorator chain: AdvancedFailoverHandler(ScatterGatherFailoverHandler(DefaultFailoverHandler)).

  • Uses of ExpiryPolicy in com.societegenerale.failover.core.expiry

    Classes in com.societegenerale.failover.core.expiry that implement ExpiryPolicy
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    DefaultExpiryPolicy<T>
    Default ExpiryPolicy that computes expiry by adding the annotation-configured duration to the current clock time, and checks expiry against the current clock.
    class 
    FailoverExpiryPolicy<T>
    Composite ExpiryPolicy that delegates to a named policy from the lookup when @Failover#expiryPolicy() is set, falling back to the default policy otherwise.
    Methods in com.societegenerale.failover.core.expiry that return ExpiryPolicy
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ExpiryPolicy<T>
    ExpiryPolicyLookup.lookup(String name)
    Returns the ExpiryPolicy registered under name, or null if not found.

    Modifier and Type

    BeanFactoryExpiryPolicyLookup.lookup(String name)
    Returns the ExpiryPolicy bean registered under name.
